name: z39
description: Z3-powered reasoning for AI agents. Verifiable yes/no answers for scheduling, boolean logic, configuration, and action safety via SMT solving.

binaryPath.description: Path to the z39 binary. Defaults to 'z39' (must be in PATH). The z3 solver binary must also be available on PATH or alongside z39.

binaryPath.label: Binary path
binaryPath.help: Absolute path to the z39 binary, or leave empty to use PATH
